info.description: Omnigram - AI-native self-hosted book library management service
info.title: Omnigram API

get.description: List all user accounts (admin only)

post.description: Create a new user account (admin only)

get.description: Get a specific user account by ID (admin only)

delete.description: Delete a user account (admin only, cannot delete self)

get.description: Get all API keys for a user

post.description: Generate a new API key for the authenticated user
Reset user password (self or admin)
Login with account credentials, sets session cookie on success
Logout current session and clear cookie
Authenticate and get a Bearer access token
Refresh an expired access token using a refresh token

get.description: Retrieve a book cover image by path
Get available TTS voice speakers

post.description: Upload and register a new TTS speaker voice
Synthesize text to speech with streaming audio output

get.description: Get the OPDS root catalog feed
Get all authors as OPDS navigation feed
Get books by a specific author as OPDS feed
Download a book file via OPDS
Get recently added books as OPDS feed
Get popular books as OPDS feed
Search books via OPDS feed
Get all shelves as OPDS navigation feed
Get books in a specific shelf as OPDS feed
Get books with a specific tag as OPDS feed
Search books by query parameters

post.description: Delete multiple books at once (admin only)
Add or remove multiple books from a shelf
Add, remove, or set tags on multiple books

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific book

put.description: Update book metadata fields (title, author, description, etc.)

delete.description: Delete a book and optionally its file

get.description: Get all annotations for a book

post.description: Create a new annotation (highlight, note, or bookmark)

put.description: Upload a custom cover image for a book (max 5MB, jpg/png/webp/gif)

get.description: Get user's reading progress for a specific book

put.description: Update user's reading progress for a specific book
Set a rating for a book (0-5)

get.description: Download the original book file
Get user's favorite books with reading progress
Get homepage data with random and recent books
Get user's reading and liked books
Get recently added or read books
Search books with advanced filters and pagination

post.description: Record a completed reading session

get.description: Get all shelves for the current user

post.description: Create a new book shelf

get.description: Get shelf details with its books

post.description: Add one or more books to a shelf

delete.description: Remove one or more books from a shelf

get.description: Get aggregated library statistics
Get most-read books ranked by total reading time
Get daily reading statistics for a date range
Get overall reading statistics
Get all tags with book counts

post.description: Create a new tag, optionally associate with a book
Upload a new book file (EPUB, PDF, etc.)
Synchronize annotations across devices
Get books updated since a given timestamp
Synchronize all book data via SSE stream

get.description: Check if the AI service is enabled and configured

post.description: Import books from a Calibre library directory (admin only). Reads metadata.db and copies book files.

get.description: Get system configuration and status information
Check if the server is responsive

post.description: Start scanning the library directory for books (admin only)

get.description: Get the current library scan status (admin only)

post.description: Stop a running library scan (admin only)

get.description: Get information about the currently authenticated user

series.description: Series is the series to which this book belongs to.

seriesIndex.description: SeriesIndex is the position in the series to which the book belongs to.

series.description: Series is the series to which this book belongs to.

seriesIndex.description: SeriesIndex is the position in the series to which the book belongs to.
